title: read_asset: compact summary then component drill-down

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Goal: confirm `unity_open_mcp_read_asset` returns a compact summary by default, and that the `component` drill-down flag expands field detail without re-pulling raw YAML (cache hit). We stage a prefab so the source demo asset is never depended on for live reads.

steps.title: Stage a prefab with a non-trivial component set
Drill into one component (fetch fields, then component flag)
Expected outcomes
items: Summary response is a compact JSON object (asset/path/guid/objects/components + cmp table + folded tree), dramatically shorter than cat-ing the .prefab
Repeated component sets are declared once in cmp and referenced by code in tree rows
Drill-down returns a componentMatches array; each entry has object (hierarchy path), component, and fields (name/value pairs)
Drill-down reports _cache: "hit" (the model was reused, no re-parse)

reset.note: read_asset is read-only; the only artifact is the staged fixture, reverted by the afterStep delete.
